hadith_entries.text:
1033. Narrated Jaber; 'The Messenger of Allah forbade
that the sword be given or taken unsheathed."

1034. Narrated Abu-Huraira; 'The Prophet said: "None of
you should point towards his Muslim brother with a weapon, for
he does not know, Satan may tempt him to hit him and thus he
would fall into a pit of fire (Hell)." (Bukhari).
Riyadhos-Saliheen (The Meadows of the Righteous)
-
